entries.statement: Design, implement, and conduct quality assurance testing and validation procedures for data systems, datasets, and analytical processes.
Define, document, and maintain enterprise data quality standards, policies, procedures, and measurement methodologies.
Continuously monitor data systems and operations, detect anomalies, assess data quality characteristics, and react to triggered events.
Establish measurement requirements, performance metrics, and scoring systems for data quality monitoring and assessment.
Design and implement data quality processes, workflows, automation approaches, and remediation procedures.
Produce comprehensive documentation of data quality assessments, trend analysis reports, and findings for governance and stakeholder decision-making.
Operate, maintain, and optimize data systems, databases, and infrastructure to ensure performance, availability, and reliability.
Create, maintain, and update enterprise data catalogs, asset registries, and metadata documentation to support data governance.
Document data lineage, supply chain risks, and develop comprehensive risk management documentation for data assets.
Analyze, define, and document data requirements, specifications, and priority information needs for organizational applications.
Design, develop, implement, and maintain automated data pipelines and data warehousing systems with built-in quality controls.
Operate data quality issue management processes including intake, prioritization, remediation tracking, and closure verification.
Design and implement organizational governance structures, policies, and internal controls for data quality and management.
Conduct comprehensive quality assurance activities throughout the data and AI system lifecycle, including testing, monitoring, and compliance verification.
Assess data quality framework effectiveness, evaluate compliance with standards, and validate assessment and monitoring processes.
Profile, assess, and evaluate data quality, completeness, consistency, and fitness for purpose against quality standards.
